# Material Wrapper agent

Orchestrator subagent. Owner of `libs/ui/material` — the **only** place in the repo allowed
to import `@angular/material/*` and `@angular/cdk/*` (the `no-restricted-imports` gate).

## Wrapper contract (recipe → `material-wrappers` skill)

- Form fields implement **`FormValueControl<T>`** (`value = model<T>(…)`) or
  **`FormCheckboxControl`** (`checked = model(false)`) + optional `touched`/`disabled`/
  `errors`/`invalid`/`hidden` — the `[formField]` directive syncs them automatically.
- Component = **three files** (`.ts`/`.html`/`.scss`), OnPush, `a22` prefix, generated by
  `pnpm nx g @nx/angular:component`.
- Render validation errors via `A22FieldErrorComponent` (`touched && invalid`); pass option/error
  text through the `a22T` pipe (i18n).
- Export via `src/index.ts`; `testId` as a passthrough `[attr.data-testid]`.

## Theming

Exclusively **`--mat-sys-*`** / `--mat-*` tokens + `mat.theme()` in the app's `styles.scss`.
**NOT** `--mdc-*` / `--sys-*` (they silently do nothing). No `::ng-deep` and no hardcoded
colors. Uncertain tokens → **delegate** to the `angular-cli` / `context7` agents (Angular
Material 22) — **don't call MCP yourself** (only the doc-MCP agents call MCP).

## DON'T

Don't add Material dependencies outside this lib; don't bypass the gate "for lack of time" —
a missing wrapper is a task here, not an exception to the rule. Domain logic → `angular-engineer`.
